title: kayea paniculata
intro: Kayea paniculata, also known as the Kayea tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Calophyllaceae, native to Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat a variety of health conditions. The health benefits of Kayea paniculata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Kayea paniculata, such as infusions and decoctions, are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
